creator: nick@kirby.cx
text:
Created attachment 250891
New port py-apprise 1.8.0 v2

diff updated/corrected to be in line with Zsolt's reccomendations.

Added a depends on py-paho-mqtt being updated to 2.1.0 because that should fix the functionality issue that has been keeping this port on hold.

To be clear, requirements for py-apprise on the guthub still have py-paho-mqtt set at 1.6.1, but the changes to 2.1.0 should allow it to work with the newer version regardless as it will assume v1 API calls by default.

Thanks again
